text: Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in Washington, IL, an extensive search was made in the surrounding communities for recent 2-unit sales. The comparables were selected in order to demonstrate the marketability of 2-unit properties of a similar GBA, room count, and condition. Due to recent market trends the comparables received a market time adjustment of 6.9% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size and quality. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its location, site size, age, and lack of a basement. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its location, site size, age, inferior condition, GBA, bathroom count, and lack of a basement.
